title: crambe hispanica
intro: Crambe hispanica, also known as sea kale or orache, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits such as improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and supporting bone health. Crambe hispanica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
